title: Oil Red O Staining
author: Yuejun Wang
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.iemcbc6

steps.title: Cells were grown in the adipose-inducing medium for 2-3 weeks
steps.instruction: Cells were grown in the adipose-inducing medium for 2-3 weeks.

steps.title: After induction, cells were fixed with...
steps.instruction: After induction, cells were fixed with 10% formalin for at least 1 h at room temperature.

steps.title: Cells were stained with the 60%...
steps.instruction: Cells were stained with the 60% Oil Red O in isopropanol as working solution for 10 min.

steps.title: The proportion of Oil Red O-positive...
steps.instruction: The proportion of Oil Red O-positive cells was determined by counting stained cells under a light microscope.

steps.title: The final OD value in each...
steps.instruction: The final OD value in each group was normalized with the total protein concentrations prepared from a duplicate plate.
